step1.title: Request a Quote
step1.desc: Choose your package or request a custom quote via WhatsApp. We respond within minutes.

step2.title: Confirm Booking

step3.title: Move Day
step3.desc: Our professional team arrives on time, handles everything with care, and gets you settled.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say

faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.subtitle: Quick answers to common moving questions
faqs.q1: How far in advance should I book?
faqs.a1: We recommend booking at least 3-5 days in advance for local moves. For international relocations, 2-3 weeks is ideal. However, we also accommodate urgent same-day moves when availability allows.
faqs.a2: Absolutely not. Our pricing is transparent. The hourly rate covers the van, driver, and movers as specified in your package. VAT (21%) is added on top. Time is calculated from departure to return to our Maastricht location.
faqs.a3: Yes! All students get free ride-along service within Maastricht. Just show your student ID on moving day. We also offer special student-friendly pricing for small moves.
faqs.q4: What if something gets damaged during the move?
faqs.a4: All our moves include transport insurance. In the rare event of damage, we have a straightforward claims process. Our team is trained in professional handling techniques to minimize any risk.
faqs.q5: Can I ride along in the moving van?
faqs.a5: Yes! Within Maastricht it is €10 fixed. Outside Maastricht (25-50km) it is €0.50/km. Students ride free within Maastricht. For long-distance moves, we provide a custom quote.

cta.title: Ready to Move?
cta.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation quote in minutes. Our team is ready to make your next move stress-free.

about_us.title: About MoveIt Maastricht
about_us.subtitle: Your premier moving partner in the Netherlands and across Europe.

who_we_are.title: Who We Are
who_we_are.text: Based in the heart of Maastricht, MoveIt Logistics started with a simple mission: to make moving as stress-free as possible. Over the last 10 years, we have grown from a local van service into a comprehensive relocation provider serving thousands of families, students, and businesses across the Netherlands, Belgium, and Germany.

expertise.title: Our Expertise
expertise.text: Whether it's a student studio in the city center or a large family villa in the suburbs, we handle every move with the same level of care and precision. Our fleet of modern vehicles is equipped with high-quality packing materials, specialized straps, and hydraulic lifts to ensure your belongings reach their destination safely.

standards.title: Professional Standards
standards.text: We are fully licensed and insured. Our team consists of vetted professionals who are trained in the latest packing and transport techniques. We take pride in our punctuality and transparent pricing — ensuring there are no surprises on your moving day.

about_us.content_p1: Based in the heart of Maastricht, MoveIt Logistics is more than just a moving company. We are your dedicated relocation partner.
about_us.mission_text: To provide a seamless, transparent, and high-quality moving experience that relocates people, not just boxes.
about_us.seo_title: About MoveIt Maastricht | Professional Moving Services NL
about_us.seo_description: MoveIt Maastricht is your trusted partner for seamless relocations. With 10+ years of experience, we provide stress-free residential and business moving services across the Netherlands and Europe.

services.title: Our Specialized Services
services.subtitle: Expert solutions for every type of relocation, from local student moves to international business transitions.

student.title: Student Moving
student.desc: Budget-friendly moving with free ride-along for students in Maastricht.

local.desc: Fast and efficient relocation within Maastricht and the Limburg region.

long_distance.title: Long Distance Moving
long_distance.desc: Seamless moving services to any city across the Netherlands.

international.desc: Reliable cross-border relocations to Belgium, Germany, and beyond.

full_service.title: Full-Service Moving
full_service.desc: A complete hands-off experience: we pack, move, and unpack for you.

furniture_assembly.title: Furniture Assembly
furniture_assembly.desc: Professional disassembly and assembly of all your furniture pieces.

packing.title: Packing & Unpacking
packing.desc: Expert packing with high-quality materials to protect your valuables.

lift_rental.title: Moving Lift Rental
lift_rental.desc: Specialized lifting equipment for safe moving to high-floor apartments.

piano.title: Piano Moving
piano.desc: Specialized care and equipment for moving delicate musical instruments.

senior.title: Senior Moving
senior.desc: Compassionate and stress-free relocation services tailored for seniors.

storage.title: Storage Rental
storage.desc: Secure, climate-controlled storage solutions for short or long-term needs.

clearance.title: Home Clearance
clearance.desc: Professional and respectful clearing of residential and commercial spaces.

locations.title: Our Locations & Service Areas
locations.subtitle: Providing premium moving services across the Netherlands, with a specialized focus on the Euregio Meuse-Rhine.
locations.regional_text: Based in Maastricht, we are the experts for relocations in South Limburg. Whether you're moving within the city or to a neighboring village, our team knows every street and ensures a smooth transition.
locations.intl_text: Thanks to our strategic location, we specialize in international moves between the Netherlands, Belgium, and Germany. We regularly serve cities like Aachen, Liège, and Brussels with the same care and efficiency as our local moves.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about your upcoming move.
faq.q1: How far in advance should I book?
faq.a1: We recommend booking at least 3-5 days in advance for local moves. For international relocations, 2-3 weeks is ideal. However, we also accommodate urgent same-day moves when availability allows.
faq.a2: Absolutely not. Our pricing is transparent. The hourly rate covers the van, driver, and movers as specified in your package. VAT (21%) is added on top. Time is calculated from departure to return to our Maastricht location.
faq.a3: Yes! All students get free ride-along service within Maastricht. Just show your student ID on moving day. We also offer special student-friendly pricing for small moves.
faq.q4: What if something gets damaged during the move?
faq.a4: All our moves include transport insurance. In the rare event of damage, we have a straightforward claims process. Our team is trained in professional handling techniques to minimize any risk.
faq.q5: Can I ride along in the moving van?
faq.a5: Yes, we allow one passenger to ride along for free in the moving van to your destination, saving you the cost of a taxi or train ticket.
faq.q6: Can I book a move on short notice?
faq.a6: Yes, we often accommodate urgent moves. Contact us via WhatsApp for the fastest response regarding same-day or next-day availability.
faq.a7: Yes, we can provide professional-grade moving boxes, bubble wrap, and heavy-duty tape at a small additional cost or as part of a full-service package.
faq.a8: Absolutely. Our partner storage facilities are 24/7 monitored, climate-controlled, and fully insured for your peace of mind.
faq.a9: Yes, we have extensive experience in business moves, ensuring minimal downtime for your operations during the transition.
faq.a10: While we are based in Maastricht, we cover the entire Netherlands, as well as cross-border moves to Belgium and Germany.
faq.q11: Are my belongings insured during transport?
faq.a11: Yes, every item we transport is covered by our Goods-in-Transit insurance from the moment we pick it up until it's delivered.
faq.a12: Yes, our team is equipped with tools to professionally disassemble and reassemble your furniture at the destination upon request.
faq.a13: Yes, we have specialized equipment and trained staff for safe piano transport, ensuring your instrument is moved securely.
faq.q14: How do I get a quote?
faq.a14: You can fill out our online quote form, or simply send us a list of your items and locations on WhatsApp for a quick estimate.
faq.q15: Do you offer senior moving services?
faq.a15: Yes, we provide a compassionate service for seniors, handling every detail with extra care and patience to ensure a stress-free transition.
faq.q16: Is there a limit on the number of items?
faq.a16: No, we handle everything from single-item deliveries to large residential and commercial relocations.
faq.q17: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a17: We accept bank transfers, Tikkie (for local clients), and all major credit cards.
